nodes.title: Load Sidebar From API
nodes.description: When business layout loads, GET /api/businesses/:bizId/users/:userId/sidebar. Success: display sidebar with sections and items, only visible items. Failure or empty: use fallback menu from buildFallbackMenu. Sections show title; items are links with icon and label.

nodes.title: Navigate On Sidebar Click
nodes.description: When user clicks a sidebar item link, navigate to item route (e.g. /biz/1/accounts). RouterLinkActive marks current item as active. No full page reload.
